title: MD
biography: Paulo Chapchap is a Brazilian transplant surgeon who performed the first pediatric liver transplant in Latin America and built one of the largest pediatric transplant programs in the world at Hospital Sirio-Libanes.
aiSummary: Paulo Chapchap is a transplant surgery specialist at Hospital Sirio-Libanes. Based in Brazil.
